risks.description: 250GB database exceeds 200GB threshold. Network transfer and index rebuild can take 6-12 hours, exceeding standard maintenance windows.
risks.mitigation: Use Azure Database Migration Service with continuous sync. Pre-copy bulk data during business hours, then delta sync at cutover.
risks.contingency: If DMS sync fails, fall back to backup/restore with extended downtime window (12-16 hrs).

risks.description: Media stored in SQL DB (~50GB+) inflates database size, increases migration time, and causes ongoing performance and cost concerns on Azure SQL.
risks.mitigation: Consider migrating to Azure Blob Storage during replatform. If keeping in DB, plan for larger migration window and increased Azure SQL storage costs.
risks.contingency: Keep media in SQL initially, plan post-migration media externalization as phase 2.

risks.description: AWS Secrets Manager to Azure Key Vault migration requires code changes. Different API, naming conventions, SDK, and access patterns.
risks.mitigation: Audit all code for AWS SDK usage. Replace with Azure Key Vault SDK. Update connection string references and access patterns.
risks.contingency: Use environment variables as temporary bridge during migration.

risks.description: Unicorn has documented issues on Azure App Service — path length bugs, physicalRootPath issues, transparent sync problems. In maintenance mode since 2020.
risks.mitigation: Deploy on Azure VMs (not App Service) to avoid path issues. Validate Unicorn sync on target VMs early. Consider SCS migration for long-term Azure strategy.
risks.contingency: If Unicorn fails on Azure VMs, use database backup/restore for initial content population.

risks.description: Database HA configuration unknown. If Always On AG or mirroring exists, migration approach changes — SQL MI Business Critical tier required instead of General Purpose.
risks.mitigation: Verify HA configuration with client DBA before estimating. Plan for SQL MI Business Critical if HA required.
risks.contingency: Default to General Purpose tier, upgrade to Business Critical post-migration if needed.

risks.description: 30+ custom Solr indexes require individual schema review, config migration, and rebuild validation. 1.6x effort multiplier on search migration.
risks.mitigation: Inventory all indexes and custom schema configs. Deploy Solr on Azure VM. Plan parallel index rebuild. Validate search results post-rebuild.
risks.contingency: If index rebuild fails, restore Solr data directory from backup.

risks.description: 20 CloudFront distributions need mapping to Azure Front Door Premium. WAF rules need rewriting. Custom error pages need porting.
risks.mitigation: Consolidate into Front Door Premium (~$330/mo). Map each distribution's origin, rules, and behaviors. Rewrite WAF rules for Azure WAF.
risks.contingency: Migrate distributions in batches, keeping CloudFront active as fallback.

risks.description: ~30 TeamCity build configs need migration to Azure Pipelines. Includes Unicorn builds, npm builds, Snyk scans, and deployment automation.
risks.mitigation: Source already on Azure DevOps Repos — simplifies migration. Plan phased migration by repo group. Template common pipeline patterns.
risks.contingency: Keep TeamCity operational in parallel during pipeline migration.

risks.description: Compliance requirements unknown. If PCI/HIPAA/GDPR applies, could trigger 1.2-1.5x multiplier across all components.
risks.mitigation: Verify compliance requirements with client legal/security team before finalizing estimate.
risks.contingency: If compliance discovered late, add compliance remediation phase post-migration.

dependency_chains.notes: Main critical path. backup_dr also required before cutover_execution.

complexity_multipliers_active.reason: 30+ custom Solr indexes (> 5 threshold, supersedes custom_solr_indexes)
Global multi-site instance with 20 CDN distributions, ~30 repos — assumed > 10 sites

risk_clusters.name: Data Migration
risk_clusters.description: Large database with embedded media and unknown HA config creates significant data migration risk. Migration window could exceed 12 hours.

risk_clusters.name: Search Migration
risk_clusters.description: High custom index count significantly increases Solr migration complexity and rebuild time.

risk_clusters.name: CI/CD Pipeline Migration
risk_clusters.description: Large pipeline migration effort, mitigated by source already being on Azure DevOps Repos.

risk_clusters.name: CDN & WAF Migration
risk_clusters.description: Many CDN distributions need consolidated into Azure Front Door Premium with WAF rule rewriting.

risk_clusters.name: Integration & Secrets
risk_clusters.description: Code changes needed for Key Vault migration and Unicorn Azure compatibility workarounds.

top_gaps.question: database_compliance_requirements
top_gaps.impact: High — could trigger 1.2-1.5x multiplier across all components

top_gaps.impact: Medium — affects Solr VM disk provisioning and rebuild time

top_gaps.impact: Medium — affects Azure Cache for Redis tier selection

top_gaps.question: dns_zone_count
top_gaps.impact: Medium — affects DNS cutover effort and planning

top_gaps.question: email_smtp_provider
top_gaps.impact: Low-Medium — affects SMTP relay configuration on Azure
